scripts.build: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-zero build && node ../effect-zero/dist/cli/index.mjs generate --config ./effect-zero.config.ts --output ./src/zero/schema.ts --skip-declare --format --force && vp pack
scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-sql-kit build && node ../effect-sql-kit/dist/cli/index.mjs generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-sql-kit build && node ../effect-sql-kit/dist/cli/index.mjs migrate
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-sql-kit build && node ../effect-sql-kit/dist/cli/index.mjs push
